revision.text: CO<sub>2</sub>

CO<sub>2</sub>
<noinclude> [[zh:Template:二氧化碳]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Remove hard return which is messing up formatting when template is used.
revision.text: CO<sub>2</sub> <noinclude> [[zh:Template:二氧化碳]] </noinclude>
CO<sub>2</sub><noinclude> [[zh:Template:二氧化碳]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: fix, since this is a template
[[Help:Reverting|Reverted]] edits by [[Special:Contributions/82.208.46.204|82.208.46.204]] ([[User talk:82.208.46.204|talk]]) to last version by Gobonobo
[[Help:Reverting|Reverted]] edits by [[Special:Contributions/178.63.192.166|178.63.192.166]] ([[User talk:178.63.192.166|talk]]) to last version by Pinethicket
[[Help:Reverting|Reverted]] edits by [[Special:Contributions/178.63.192.166|178.63.192.166]] ([[User talk:178.63.192.166|talk]]) to last version by OlEnglish
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Rmnrmrnmrnmr|Rmnrmrnmrnmr]] ([[User talk:Rmnrmrnmrnmr|talk]]) to last revision by UpstateNYer ([[WP:HG|HG]])

revision.text: {{#if:{{{link|}}}|[[Carbon dioxide|CO<sub>2</sub>]]|CO<sub>2</sub>}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <carbon dioxide is really goood for health>

revision.comment: Highly visible vandalism. Undid revision 501235941 by [[Special:Contributions/175.137.85.60|175.137.85.60]] ([[User talk:175.137.85.60|talk]])
Using {{chem}} templates - makes it look nicer
Undid revision 608158400. Don't use chem: in inline usage it causes space above the line the symbol is in.

revision.text: {{#if:{{{link|}}}|{{chem2|CO2|link=Carbon dioxide}}|{{chem2|CO2}} }}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Added {{nowrap}} to disallow line breaks before the 2.
revision.text: {{nowrap|{{#if:{{{link|}}}|{{chem2|CO2|link=Carbon dioxide}}|{{chem2|CO2}} }}}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:CO2]]": High risk template. ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{nowrap|{{#if:{{{link|}}}|{{chem2|CO2|link=Carbon dioxide}}|{{chem2|CO2}} }}}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>
{{nowrap|{{#if:{{{link|}}}|{{chem|C|O|2|link=Carbon dioxide}}|{{chem|C|O|2}} }}}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Template-free version from sandbox. {{chem}} breaks the ability to search for text, and {{chem2}} breaks citation templates, so plain HTML seems safest. Also performs better.
revision.text: {{#if:{{{link|}}}|[<noinclude/>[Carbon dioxide{{!}}}}CO<sub style="font-size: 80%;vertical-align: -0.35em">2</sub>{{#if:{{{link|}}}|]]}}<noinclude><!-- Styles are copied from Module:Chem2/styles.css. -->{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: 28 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:CO2]]: importing because this actually has redlinks for a lot of the articles
revision.text: {{#if:{{{link|}}}|[<noinclude/>[Carbon dioxide{{!}}}}CO<sub style="font-size: 80%;vertical-align: -0.35em">2</sub>{{#if:{{{link|}}}|]]}}<noinclude><!-- Styles are copied from Module:Chem2/styles.css. -->{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=CO2 here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
